meta.title: Risk Assessment (HIRA) — Confined-Space Entry, Tank T-402
meta.subtitle: Plant 3, Maharashtra — own workers + contractors
meta.author: HSE Department
meta.deid_notice: All personnel are referred to by role label. Identifiers were pseudonymised before drafting; the re-identification key is held separately and is not part of this document.

sections.text: HIRA for confined-space entry to clean tank T-402 (isolate -> purge -> gas-test -> enter -> clean -> exit) at Plant 3, scored on the org 5x5 matrix per ISO 45001 6.1.2. An ISO 14001 6.1.2 environmental-aspects assessment of the associated solvent degreasing line was run in the same pass (Q0 = Both).

items: Task: confined-space entry to clean tank T-402 (6 steps)
Site: Plant 3, Maharashtra; exposed: own workers + contractors
Scored on the org 5x5 matrix (multiply; Low 1-4 / Medium 5-9 / High 10-15 / Critical 16-25)
Standards: ISO 45001 6.1.2 (HIRA) + 8.1.2 (hierarchy of controls); ISO 14001 6.1.2 (environmental aspects) for the environmental branch

rows.title: Oxygen deficiency on entry
rows.description: Step 'enter': nitrogen purge can leave <19.5% O2 in T-402.

rows.title: Engulfment by residual sludge
rows.description: Step 'clean': unstable sludge in the tank base.

rows.title: VOC emissions to air (solvent vapour)
rows.description: Aspect: solvent vapour from the spray step -> impact: air quality / VOC. Operating condition: normal + abnormal (drain-down). Significance scored on the SAME 5x5 matrix (environmental consequence descriptors).

rows.title: Spent solvent released to water
rows.description: Aspect: spent solvent at the drain step -> impact: water contamination. Operating condition: abnormal (maintenance drain-down).

rows.control: Eliminate entry — clean externally via CIP where feasible
Continuous forced-air ventilation + continuous gas monitoring
Entry permit + standby attendant + rescue plan
Substitute the chlorinated solvent with an aqueous degreaser (env aspect)
Enclose the degreasing line + carbon-capture the VOC (env aspect)

rows.action: Install a fixed continuous gas monitor on T-402 with interlock
Trial and qualify an aqueous degreaser to substitute the solvent
Revise the confined-space entry SOP + rescue plan

items: ISO 45001 clause 6.1.2 (hazard identification & assessment of risks) + 8.1.2 (hierarchy of controls)
Maharashtra — the resolved state accident/dangerous-occurrence form via KB-REG-IN-STATEFORMS (state confirmed; never a national form number)
ISO 14001 clause 6.1.2 (environmental aspects & impacts) — environmental branch
Environmental compliance obligations (Q-E5): VOC emission limit + spent-solvent discharge consent
